MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $590.00 FILED BY DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS AS TO DEFENDANT FABBRI, CHRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO, JAMES DBA JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FABBRI, CHRISTINA $590.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $590.00, DEFENDANT MAY PAY JUDGMENT DIRECTLY TO THE COURT AT A RATE OF $50.00 PER MONTH, STARTING 12/30/07 AND ON THE 30TH DAY OF THE MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2007 - JUDGMENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
